x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Trigger Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Initiate the crediting of money or incentive value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility & Qualification Validation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirm the credit is allowed and valid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determine the correct credit amount.

comment:
Examples:
Apply 5% cashback rate
Calculate daily interest × balance
Apply bonus multiplier
Enforce cap or maximum limit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post the approved credit to the appropriate account.

Comment:
Examples:
Credit cashback to incentive account
Post interest to savings account
Disburse loan amount to deposit account
Apply statement credit to credit card

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Grant Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to approve and establish a credit facility (e.g., loan, line of credit) for a borrower under agreed terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Drawdown Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request by the borrower to utilize (fully or partially) an approved credit facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Repayment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute a payment toward the outstanding credit obligation (principal, interest, or fees).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Limit Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to increase, decrease, or otherwise modify the approved credit limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Interest Application Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to calculate and apply interest charges to a credit account based on agreed terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Fee Application Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to apply fees (e.g., service fees, late fees) associated with the credit facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Rollover Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to extend or renew a credit facility or its repayment terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Settlement Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to fully settle and close a credit obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Suspension Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to temporarily halt the availability or usage of a credit facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Cancellation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to terminate an existing credit facility before its scheduled end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Restructuring Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify key terms of a credit agreement (e.g., tenor, interest rate, repayment schedule) due to changing circumstances.
